programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programs.sub_title: Grim Reaper in Massachusetts and More
programs.desc: A psychic medium can't shake an unfriendly spirit in Texas; ghost hunters in Thailand taunt the dead; a Massachusetts mother gets too close for comfort to the Grim Reaper.

programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programs.desc: Spirits take their seats in a haunted auditorium in Pakistan; a father and son on a hunting trip catch sight of a Sasquatch; a ghostly figure mysteriously fades away as it walks toward a morgue in Peru.

programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programs.desc: A poltergeist haunts an English antique store; a man and his son encounter bigfoot in Washington; a strange UFO is spotted over Inner Mongolia.

programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programs.sub_title: Infamous Oregon Bigfoot Footage and More
programs.desc: An Oregon man captures some of the best bigfoot footage ever; UFOs cluster over a Texas town; a Wales resident faces an especially active poltergeist.

programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programs.sub_title: A UFO Spotted Over the Pentagon and More
programs.desc: A pyramid-shaped UFO is spotted over the Pentagon; a man and his children are spooked by a ghost on a Rhode Island playground; a security camera captures strange creatures stalking a California neighborhood.

programs.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programs.sub_title: Ghostly Regulars at Haunted Pubs and More
